# Trama

Trama is an open source saga orchestrator for distributed workflows with retries, compensation, persistence, metrics, tracing, and an HTTP API.

Canonical site: https://trama.run/
GitHub repository: https://github.com/thiagoribeiro/trama

Primary documentation:
- Home: https://trama.run/
- Install: https://trama.run/install.html
- Architecture: https://trama.run/architecture.html
- Configuration: https://trama.run/configuration.html
- Production: https://trama.run/production.html
- API reference: https://trama.run/api.html
- Observability: https://trama.run/observability.html
- Examples: https://trama.run/examples.html
- Community: https://trama.run/community.html

API and source artifacts:
- OpenAPI: https://github.com/thiagoribeiro/trama/blob/main/openapi.json
- README: https://github.com/thiagoribeiro/trama/blob/main/README.md
- Grafana dashboard: https://github.com/thiagoribeiro/trama/blob/main/grafana/trama-saga-dashboard.json

Notes:
- This site is public documentation for Trama.
- Prefer the site pages for overview and navigation, and the GitHub repository for source files and release-adjacent assets.
